final_text:
All correlations are positive but very weak across all four cell types. CD14 shows the lowest absolute Pearson correlation (r ≈ 0.0317) between gene length and average expression for protein-coding genes, compared to CD4 (r ≈ 0.0617), CD8 (r ≈ 0.0551), and CD19 (r ≈ 0.0471).

FINAL ANSWER: CD14
